title: Talent Directors
description: Audition and interview performers to select most appropriate talent for parts in stage, television, radio, or motion picture productions.

tasks.text: Audition and interview performers to match their attributes to specific roles or to increase the pool of available acting talent.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare actors for auditions by providing scripts and information about roles and casting requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Select performers for roles or submit lists of suitable performers to producers or directors for final selection.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Contact agents and actors to provide notification of audition and performance opportunities and to set up audition times.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Serve as liaisons between directors, actors, and agents.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Negotiate contract agreements with performers, with agents, or between performers and agents or production companies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange for or design screen tests or auditions for prospective performers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review performer information, such as photos, resumes, voice tapes, videos, and union membership, to decide whom to audition for parts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain talent files that include information such as performers' specialties, past performances, and availability.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read scripts and confer with producers to determine the types and numbers of performers required for a given production.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend or view productions to maintain knowledge of available actors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Hire and supervise workers who help locate people with specified attributes and talents.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Locate performers or extras for crowd and background scenes, and stand-ins or photo doubles for actors, by direct contact or through agents.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
